name: Johan Sellgren
notes: Johan called Ben by the wrong name three times (Dan, David, David) in a 79-minute Fourth HR Conversation meeting.

name: Adrian Ford
notes: Adrian Ford is Ben's manager and internal advocate. Departing ~June 2026 (VERBAL ONLY — no written confirmation). On leave 6-16 Mar 2026. Was told NOT to engage with Ben on redeployment — evidence of deliberate isolation (corroborated by Marqia, verbal, confidential). Was tasked with defining 'what success looks like in 6 months' for Ben's redeployed role but NEVER COMPLETED this — creating a structural gap where any role acceptance leaves Ben subject to the same subjective evaluation that triggered the separation process. Acknowledged being 'limited in what I can do' — constraints placed on his engagement.

name: Helena Borg Jodelsohn
notes: Helena Borg Jodelsohn is the Unionen representative. Email: medlemsservice.uppsagning@unionen.se. WRITTEN OFF — provided clause feedback but cannot help further without formal case. Clause review and escalation advisory shifted to independent review (independent review). TODO-022 and TODO-031 closed as shifted to independent review. Ombudsman and central representation paths remain open separately.

notes: Marqia Williams is Eng Director. Structural obstacle. Received 14 direct reports from Ben without notification. Confirmed team trust at 'zero'. Told 'there will be no handover' and that Ben is on garden leave (neither true). 'Any role in Content Platform would absolutely cause confusion' — blocks all CP IC paths.
